jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CaratLane - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!
